zh.lifeSummary: 當Murcertac O Toole於大約1080年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，他的父親Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan27歲，母親Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail21歲。他於1113年與Cacht Ní Morda在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德洛結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1164年在愛爾蘭度布林享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Murcertac O Toole于大约1080年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，他的父亲Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan27岁，母亲Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail21岁。他于1113年与Cacht Ní Morda在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德洛结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1164年在爱尔兰度布林享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Toole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Towle  . The English and Irish origins of the name can be difficult to distinguish.

variants.name: O'Toole
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Caitlin, Eamonn, Eoin, Kelan, Kieran, Michael Patrick, Niall, Patrick James, Peadar, Siobhan.

Irish (Dublin): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuathail ‘descendant of Tuathal’, an ancient Celtic personal name based on tuath ‘people’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare Toland . This name has also been erroneously associated with Gaelic tuile ‘flood’ and therefore occasionally Anglicized as Flood .

variants.name: Tool
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Toole  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Murcertac O Toole was born about 1080, in County Meath, Ireland, his father, Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan, was 27 and his mother, Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail, was 21. He married Cacht Ní Morda in 1113, in Lough, County Wexford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1164, in Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 86.

fr.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Murcertac O Toole est né environ 1080, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Cacht Ní Morda en 1113, à Lough, County Wexford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1164, à Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Murcertac O Toole um 1080 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan 27 und seine Mutter Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail 21. Er hat 1113 in Lough, County Wexford, Irland Cacht Ní Morda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1164 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Dublin, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Murcertac O Toole è nato il circa 1080 nel County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Cacht Ní Morda nel 1113, nel Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1164, nel Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Murcertac O Tooleが約1080年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuanは27歳，母Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domailは21歳であった。1113年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードロウでCacht Ní Mordaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1164年にアイルランドダブリンで86歳で死去した。

ko.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 스트. 마이'스 클론멀
ko.lifeSummary: Murcertac O Toole(이)가 대략 1080년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1113년 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 루그h에서 Cacht Ní Morda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1164년 아일랜드 드블린에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: St. Mary's Clonmel, County Waterford, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Murcertac O Toole nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Cacht Ní Morda em 1113, em Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1164, em Dublin, Irlanda, com 86 anos.

ru.Glendalough, Waterford, Ireland: ст. мэри'с клонмел, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Murcertac O Toole родился около 1080 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Gilla Comgaill O'Tuathai MacDonncuan было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sadb Ingen Mael Morda Ní Domail, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Cacht Ní Morda в 1113 г. в местности лоую, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1164 г. в местности дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 86 лет.

Se casó con Cacht Ní Morda en 1113, en Lough, County Wexford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1164, en Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 86 años.
